SELECT
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'SME') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'LAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'KAM') -
  (SELECT AVG(total_consumption) FROM lowest WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM
  (SELECT 1) AS dummy
CROSS JOIN
  (WITH cust_cons AS (
      SELECT c.CustomerID,
             c.Segment,
             SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
        AND substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
      GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
    ),
    min_cons AS (
      SELECT Segment,
             MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
      FROM cust_cons
      GROUP BY Segment
    ),
    lowest AS (
      SELECT cc.Segment,
             cc.total_consumption
      FROM cust_cons cc
      JOIN min_cons mc ON cc.Segment = mc.Segment
                       AND cc.total_consumption = mc.min_consumption
    )
  ) AS lowest;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT Segment, pct, 'biggest' AS type
FROM (
    SELECT s.Segment,
           (s2013.total - s2012.total) / s2013.total * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2013
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2012
      ON s2013.Segment = s2012.Segment
     AND s2013.yr = '2013'
     AND s2012.yr = '2012'
) AS seg_pct
WHERE pct = (SELECT MAX(pct) FROM (
    SELECT (s2013.total - s2012.total) / s2013.total * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2013
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2012
      ON s2013.Segment = s2012.Segment
     AND s2013.yr = '2013'
     AND s2012.yr = '2012'
))
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment, pct, 'lowest' AS type
FROM (
    SELECT s.Segment,
           (s2013.total - s2012.total) / s2013.total * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2013
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2012
      ON s2013.Segment = s2012.Segment
     AND s2013.yr = '2013'
     AND s2012.yr = '2012'
) AS seg_pct
WHERE pct = (SELECT MIN(pct) FROM (
    SELECT (s2013.total - s2012.total) / s2013.total * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2013
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.Segment,
               substr(y.Date,1,4) AS yr,
               SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
        FROM yearmonth y
        JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
        WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
        GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
    ) s2012
      ON s2013.Segment = s2012.Segment
     AND s2013.yr = '2013'
     AND s2012.yr = '2012'
));	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT sa.account_id,
       (max_all - lsf.A11) AS gap
FROM (
    SELECT a.account_id
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
    WHERE c.client_id = (
        SELECT c2.client_id
        FROM client c2
        WHERE c2.gender = 'F'
        AND c2.birth_date = (
            SELECT MIN(birth_date)
            FROM client
            WHERE gender = 'F'
        )
        ORDER BY di.A11 ASC
        LIMIT 1
    )
) AS sa
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(A11) AS max_all
    FROM district
) AS stats
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT di.A11
    FROM client c
    JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
    JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
    JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
